<?php /* * This file is part of Psy Shell. * * (c) 2012-2026 Justin Hileman * * For the full copyright and license information, please view the LICENSE * file that was distributed with this source code. */ namespace Psy; /** * ContextAware interface. * * This interface is used to pass the Shell's context into commands and such * which require access to the current scope variables. */ interface ContextAware { /** * Set the Context reference. */ public function setContext(Context $context); }
